title: Vision Inference Prediction Record
description: Per-prediction provenance record emitted by a vision-model adapter. The object the acceptance-eval gate and prediction logging both consume. Records model identity + version, the (referenced, never raw) input, the preprocessing applied, outputs with confidence, the decision taken, and slice tags for disaggregated evaluation.

prediction_id.description: Stable id for this prediction (for correlation in logs/traces).

model_id.description: Identity of the consumed model (provider model name or local artifact id).

model_version.description: Pinned version/revision of the consumed model. Required so a result is reproducible and drift is detectable.

model_provider.description: Provider/runtime behind the adapter (e.g. aws-rekognition, triton, local).

input_ref.description: Reference or content hash of the input image — NEVER the raw image bytes (see BIOMETRIC_DATA_HANDLING_CONTRACT and PREDICTION_LOGGING_CONTRACT).

preprocessing.description: Deterministic preprocessing applied at the adapter boundary (resize, normalization, color space). A hash or explicit descriptor so the result is reproducible.

outputs.description: Model outputs. Each carries a label and a confidence so decision policy and per-class metrics are computable.

bbox.description: Optional [x, y, w, h] or [x1, y1, x2, y2] per the adapter's documented convention.

decision.description: What the system did with the prediction (accepted, rejected, routed-to-human) per the confidence-threshold policy.

slice_tags.description: Tags enabling disaggregated (per-slice) evaluation — e.g. lighting, resolution, demographic cohort. Keys are team-defined.
